nobody01100011.headline: CPR: Inhale Dance / Carolyn Pampalone Rabbers
nobody01100011.summary: Carolyn Pampalone Rabbers is the Executive Artistic Director and founder of CPR Dance: Inhale Movement. She holds an MFA from the University of the Arts and a BFA from Western Michigan University, and her work has been featured nationally and internationally.

tabletalk.headline: Cultivate Dance / Leah Anthony
tabletalk.summary: Leah Anthony founded Cultivate Dance Project in Columbus, Ohio. She began formal dance training in Canton and has continued to choreograph, teach, and perform across Ohio.

espinita.headline: Ballet Legato / Jennifer Muselin
espinita.summary: Jennifer Muselin is a former Ohio Dance Theatre principal and soloist whose career includes performing, choreographing, and teaching. She has also worked in arts administration and event production.

reflectionsofher.headline: ConteXture Dance Detroit / Tracy Halloran
reflectionsofher.summary: Tracy Halloran works across dance, film, and choreography, and her process explores the delicacy and power of human movement. She is a performer, teacher, choreographer, and rehearsal director in the Detroit dance community.

heighho.headline: Dance Uprising / Amy Cadwallader
heighho.summary: Amy Cadwallader is a dancer, choreographer, pole dancer, performer, improviser, and educator based in Ann Arbor. She founded Dance Uprising in 2019 and continues to teach, perform, and create with the company.

fallintome.headline: Eleanor Dance Devotion / Eleanor Raygorodsk
fallintome.summary: Eleanor Raygorodsk is a choreographer and dance artist whose work bridges dance, philosophy, visual art, and performance. She also brings Pilates training into her teaching and creative practice.

lamentation.headline: Terpsichore Collective / Aimee McDonald & Peter Sparling
lamentation.summary: Aimee McDonald is Artistic Director of Terpsichore Collective and producer of Dancing in Summer, The Festival. With the company she has performed works by guest artist Peter Sparling and will be performing Martha Graham's Lamentation. Peter Sparling maintains an interdisciplinary practice as dancer, choreographer, video artist, painter, and writer, and is a longtime Martha Graham Dance Company artist.

infinitelove.headline: Breakin' Ballet / Joy Morris-Burton and Aerick Burton
infinitelove.summary: Breakin' Ballet is a Kalamazoo-based duo combining breakin' and ballet to tell stories of the human experience. Joy and Aerick Burton founded the project in 2020 and host regular dance labs for the community.

songbird.headline: Vrishali Parab
songbird.summary: Vrishali Parab is an Odissi dance artist based in Metro Detroit. Her practice is rooted in the temple and folk traditions of Odisha, India.

coverofme.headline: Diversiform Dance Project / Victoria Poirier
coverofme.summary: Victoria Poirier directs Diversiform Dance Project and creates work shaped by a range of physical and expressive movement practices. Her choreography explores performance through variety and transformation.

plumb.headline: Nicole Caruana
plumb.summary: Nicole Caruana studied dance at SUNY Purchase College, where she developed a strong interest in collaboration and compositional practice. Her work draws from both movement and biology-informed inquiry.

secure.headline: Nicole Caruana
secure.summary: Nicole Caruana studied dance at SUNY Purchase College, where she developed a strong interest in collaboration and compositional practice. Her work draws from both movement and biology-informed inquiry.

thevisitors.headline: Mixed Creative Arts Studio / Heather Friese Banet
thevisitors.summary: Heather Friese Banet leads Mixed Creative Arts Studio and develops accessible teaching methods rooted in creative expression. Her work has been shared in dance education settings and conference presentations.

analienisborn.headline: Mixed Creative Arts Studio / Kayla Wiese
analienisborn.summary: Kayla Wiese is a dance artist and educator whose training includes a wide range of styles. She continues her work in Kalamazoo and beyond through performance, teaching, and collaboration.

fragmented.headline: Mixed Creative Arts Studio / Heather Friese Banet
fragmented.summary: Heather Friese Banet leads Mixed Creative Arts Studio and develops accessible teaching methods rooted in creative expression. Her work has been shared in dance education settings and conference presentations.

murmursofmural.headline: TINGMOTION Dance Project / Tingyu Xie
murmursofmural.summary: Tingyu Xie is a choreographer and performer who founded TINGMOTION Dance and Wellness. Her work focuses on bodily awareness, wellness, and cultural expression.
